title: AGU's End Enhancements
description: Vanilla-friendly end additions, featuring new armor and tools using a new, rare, tier of metal: Endrix!
body:
Have you ever felt Minecraft should have a reason to explore the end that isn't just the Elytra? Well, no worries! 

 

With AGU's End Enhancements, a brand new tier is introduced ENDRIX.

Endrix provides higher durability, better armor toughness, and a faster attack/dig speed.

 

Endrix smithing templates are rare upgrades that can be found in End Cities.

Endrix ore is found on y0 - y40 in the end in small groups.

Endrix ingots can be created with a nether star wrapped in endrix nuggets.

 

New Effect: Void Resistance (Accessible via Chorus Fruit Yogurt & Void Resistance Potion)

-> Protects the user from the void, teleporting them to nearby land within 256 blocks

 

Upcoming Features:

New mini structures (TBD)
